OpenBCI GUI source code (Interactivity.pde) and task scripts

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring dual network streams in the OpenBCI GUI using Synthetic data. Stream 1 must use the LSL protocol with TimeSeries data type. Stream 2 must use the OSC protocol with BandPower data type, directed to IP 127.0.0.1 on port 12345. Screenshots triggered within the OpenBCI GUI are verified to be saved in /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots.
